card.criteria: A short positioning note exists in an appropriate documentation file.; The note is understandable to a first-time Public v1 user.; The note covers what the tool does, what it does not automate, and why source artifacts matter.; The change stays small and documentation-only.; The Team Lead returns a 1-round goal result with changed files, verification, risks, and recommendation.
card.next: market performs one goal round, applies the small documentation change, verifies it, and submits RESULT_READY.
card.problem: Add first-time user positioning note for Public v1
card.request: Add a short positioning note for first-time users explaining what Company Ops Public v1 does, what it does not do automatically, and why source artifacts matter. Keep scope to a small documentation change.
